examples: The right side of my brain had been so severely bruised that I was comatose for a month.
Michael sits comatose in the psych ward receiving room.
Sales in Japan will dip again, reflecting the country’s comatose economy.
But for now, the property sector, along with much else in the economy, is comatose.
She added her father was not bedridden or comatose and could hold a conversation and swallow.
